package.name: genz_lio
package.description: Independent reproduction of "GenZ-LIO: Generalizable LiDAR-Inertial Odometry Beyond Confined-Open Boundaries" (Lee et al., arXiv:2603.16273v2). Implements (1) scale-aware adaptive voxelization (PD control with sensitivity-informed gain scheduling), (2) a hybrid-metric point-to-plane / point-to-point ESIKF state update, and (3) a voxel-pruned correspondence search. NOTE: this is a clean-room reimplementation from the paper, not the authors' official code.
